5.title: Failure rate (server side errors)
5.query:
timeseries { failure_count = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count), count = sum(dt.service.request.count) }, by: { endpoint.name }
| fieldsAdd count = failure_count[] / count[]
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| fieldsRemove failure_count
| limit 20

6.title: Failure rate (client side errors)
6.query:
timeseries { failure_count = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count), count = sum(dt.service.request.count) }, by: { endpoint.name }
| fieldsAdd rate = failure_count[] / count[]
| sort arrayAvg(rate) desc
| fieldsRemove failure_count, count
| limit 20

7.title: Number of server side errors
7.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries failure_count = avg(dt.service.request.failure_count), by: { endpoint.name }
| sort arrayAvg(failure_count) desc
| limit 20

8.title: Number of client side errors
8.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries failure_count = avg(dt.service.request.failure_count), by: { endpoint.name }
| sort arrayAvg(failure_count) desc
| limit 20

13.title: Failure rate (HTTP 5xx errors)
13.query:
timeseries { count = sum(dt.service.request.count, filter: { (http.response.status_code >= 500) AND (http.response.status_code <= 599) }), count.0 = sum(dt.service.request.count) }, by: { endpoint.name }
| fieldsAdd rate = count[] / count.0[]
| sort arrayAvg(rate) desc
| fieldsRemove count.0, count
| limit 20

14.title: Failure rate (HTTP 4xx errors)
14.query:
timeseries { count = sum(dt.service.request.count, filter: { (http.response.status_code >= 400) AND (http.response.status_code <= 499) }), count.0 = sum(dt.service.request.count) }, by: { endpoint.name }
| fieldsAdd rate = count[] / count.0[]
| sort arrayAvg(rate) desc
| fieldsRemove count.0, count
| limit 20

timeseries count = avg(dt.service.request.count, filter: { (http.response.status_code >= 500) AND (http.response.status_code <= 599) }), by: { endpoint.name }

| limit 20

timeseries count = avg(dt.service.request.count), by: { endpoint.name }

45.title: Request count - client

/*
Warning:

timeseries count = avg(dt.service.request.count), by: { endpoint.name }

51.title: Number of calls without server side errors
51.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries count = avg(dt.service.request.count, filter: { failed == false }), by: { endpoint.name }
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

52.title: Number of calls without HTTP 5xx errors
52.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries count = avg(dt.service.request.count, filter: { (http.response.status_code < 500) OR (http.response.status_code > 599) }), by: { endpoint.name }
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

*/
timeseries count = avg(dt.service.request.count, filter: { failed == false }), by: { endpoint.name }
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

54.title: Number of calls without HTTP 4xx errors
54.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries count = avg(dt.service.request.count, filter: { (http.response.status_code < 400) OR (http.response.status_code > 499) }), by: { endpoint.name }

| limit 20
